assets.title: App Icon (512×512)
assets.purpose: Google Play store icon — primary brand recognition in search and home
assets.dimensions: 512 × 512 px PNG, square, no rounded corners
assets.layout: Full-bleed Dark Navy (#002847) canvas; logo centered at 72% fill with safe margins
assets.colors: Primary Navy #003D66, Dark Navy #002847, Gold #C9A24E, White #FFFFFF, Muted #888888
assets.illustration: Use attached 3D glassmorphism wallet + gold growth arrow logo as-is
assets.spacing: 14% safe margin on all sides (logo occupies ~72% of canvas)
assets.ui_elements: Logo mark only on navy background
assets.headline: —
assets.ai_prompt: Premium fintech app icon, dark navy #002847 background, centered glass wallet card with gold upward arrow, 3D glassmorphism, minimal, no text, 512x512, crisp edges, safe margins
assets.figma_notes: 512×512 frame; logo component locked aspect ratio; export 1x PNG
assets.dev_notes: Also used as Play Console high-res icon; sync to assets/icon.png via generate-brand-assets.py

assets.title: Feature Graphic (1024×500)
assets.purpose: Play Store banner — first visual above screenshots; drives install intent
assets.layout: Left: logo + wordmark + tagline + gold CTA pill. Right: phone mockup (dashboard). Bottom: trust pills. Background: navy gradient orbs
assets.colors: Primary Navy #003D66, Dark Navy #002847, Gold #C9A24E, White #FFFFFF, Muted #888888
assets.typography: Trivense: Poppins Bold 54px; Tagline: Inter Medium 22px; CTA: Poppins Bold 20px
assets.illustration: Subtle team/travel flat accent near phone; gold dot pattern
assets.spacing: 44px left margin; CTA 46px below tagline; pills 44px from bottom
assets.ui_elements: Logo, wordmark, tagline, Download Free CTA, phone mockup, trust pills
assets.headline: Trivense
assets.supporting_text: Split expenses, made easy. · Trips · Roommates · Families · Teams
assets.ai_prompt: Google Play feature graphic 1024x500, premium fintech, navy gradient, Trivense logo left, bold headline Split expenses made easy, gold CTA button, phone mockup right showing expense app, minimal clean whitespace, Splitwise Tricount style
assets.figma_notes: 1024×500; left text block max 560px; phone frame component right-aligned
assets.dev_notes: Required for Play Store listing; upload as Feature Graphic

assets.title: Phone Screenshot 1 — Split Expenses Easily
assets.purpose: Play Store screenshot #1 — highlight home feature for ASO conversion
assets.layout: Top text block, floating minimalist phone mockup below. Gradient background from light navy to white.
assets.colors: Primary Navy #003D66, Dark Navy #002847, Gold #C9A24E, White #FFFFFF, Muted #888888
assets.typography: Headline: Poppins Bold 50–54px; Subhead: Inter Medium 22px; Badge: Inter Medium 15px
assets.illustration: Four diverse people collaborating over coins and a rising line graph
assets.spacing: 48px edge padding; 64px headline-to-subhead; 19% headline band height
assets.ui_elements: Phone frame, home mock screen, badge pill, gold underline accent
assets.headline: Split Expenses Easily
assets.supporting_text: For groups, travelers, roommates, and more.
assets.ai_prompt: A premium portrait phone screenshot (1080x1920) for the 'Trivense' app. Large, bold header at the top: 'Split Expenses Easily'. Below it, smaller text: 'For groups, travelers, roommates, and more.' The main area features a clean, white background with a subtle soft blue-to-white gradient at the top. Floating in the center is a modern smartphone mockup showing the main Trivense Home Screen, which displays a balance card ('You are owed ₹1,200') and recent activity. Above and surrounding the phone mockup is a stylized flat illustration of four diverse people happily collaborating over a stack of modern coins and a rising gold line graph. The aesthetic is clean, minimal, and premium, using navy and gold accents. Rounded cards and soft shadows define the UI.
assets.figma_notes: Auto-layout headline band; component variants for Android/iOS; logo as component; phone frame as component
assets.dev_notes: Export @1x PNG; no transparency on screenshots; sRGB; optimize with pngquant or Play Console upload

assets.title: Phone Screenshot 2 — Track Every Expense
assets.purpose: Play Store screenshot #2 — highlight track feature for ASO conversion
assets.layout: Top text block, partial device view showing a complex expense form.
assets.colors: Primary Navy #003D66, Dark Navy #002847, Gold #C9A24E, White #FFFFFF, Muted #888888
assets.typography: Headline: Poppins Bold 50–54px; Subhead: Inter Medium 22px; Badge: Inter Medium 15px
assets.illustration: Close-up hands holding a phone with floating category icons (Coffee, Taxi, Groceries)
assets.spacing: 48px edge padding; 64px headline-to-subhead; 19% headline band height
assets.ui_elements: Phone frame, track mock screen, badge pill, gold underline accent
assets.headline: Track Every Expense
assets.supporting_text: Fast entry, detailed notes, and instant categories.
assets.ai_prompt: A premium portrait phone screenshot (1080x1920) for the 'Trivense' app. Large, bold header: 'Track Every Expense'. Smaller text: 'Fast entry, detailed notes, and instant categories.' The phone mockup below shows a complex 'New Expense' screen with rounded input fields for Amount, Date, Category (represented by simple outline icons), Notes, and Payer. The UI uses light navy, white, and a touch of gold. Surrounding the phone mockup is a close-up flat illustration of stylized hands holding a mobile device, with various floating category icons (like a coffee cup, a taxi, and a shopping cart) swirling above it, emphasizing the speed and detail. Minimalist and clean.
assets.figma_notes: Auto-layout headline band; component variants for Android/iOS; logo as component; phone frame as component
assets.dev_notes: Export @1x PNG; no transparency on screenshots; sRGB; optimize with pngquant or Play Console upload

The main area features multiple overlapping phone mockups in a slight diagonal grid. These phone screens each display a list of rounded 'Board' cards, showcasing examples like 'Summer Goa Trip', '9th Street Apartment', and 'Team Project'. The board list uses clear icons (airplane, house, gear) and minimal text. The background is white with subtle depth and clean navy and gold accents. The overall look is clean, efficient, and sophisticated.

assets.title: Phone Screenshot 4 — Budgets & Alerts
assets.purpose: Play Store screenshot #4 — highlight budget feature for ASO conversion

assets.colors: Primary Navy #003D66, Dark Navy #002847, Gold #C9A24E, White #FFFFFF, Muted #888888

assets.ui_elements: Phone frame, budget mock screen, badge pill, gold underline accent
assets.headline: Budgets & Alerts
assets.supporting_text: Set spending limits and receive instant notifications.
assets.ai_prompt: A premium portrait phone screenshot (1080x1920) for the 'Trivense' app. Large, bold header: 'Budgets & Alerts'. Smaller text: 'Set spending limits and receive instant notifications.' The phone mockup below shows a specific 'Board Budget' screen. The main feature is a clear horizontal progress bar indicating ₹15,000 out of ₹20,000 spent, rendered in white, navy, and accented in gold. Overlaid on the screen is a clean, rounded notification card with an exclamation icon that reads 'Budget Alert: 75% Spent'. The surrounding area features a stylized flat illustration of a secure money bag with a shield and a small floating notification bell. The lighting and design are sophisticated and clean.
assets.figma_notes: Auto-layout headline band; component variants for Android/iOS; logo as component; phone frame as component
assets.dev_notes: Export @1x PNG; no transparency on screenshots; sRGB; optimize with pngquant or Play Console upload

assets.title: Phone Screenshot 5 — Real-time Sync
assets.purpose: Play Store screenshot #5 — highlight sync feature for ASO conversion
assets.layout: Symmetrical layout with two interconnected devices and cloud icon between them.
assets.colors: Primary Navy #003D66, Dark Navy #002847, Gold #C9A24E, White #FFFFFF, Muted #888888
assets.typography: Headline: Poppins Bold 50–54px; Subhead: Inter Medium 22px; Badge: Inter Medium 15px
assets.illustration: Cloud icon connecting two phones with upward arrows and gold data particles
assets.spacing: 48px edge padding; 64px headline-to-subhead; 19% headline band height
assets.ui_elements: Phone frame, sync mock screen, badge pill, gold underline accent
assets.headline: Real-time Sync
assets.supporting_text: Instant updates across all your group's devices.
assets.ai_prompt: A premium portrait phone screenshot (1080x1920) for the 'Trivense' app. Large, bold header: 'Real-time Sync'. Smaller text: 'Instant updates across all your group's devices.' Two minimalist smartphone mockups are shown floating side-by-side. Both devices display identical screens with matching recent activity feeds, emphasizing immediate, seamless updating (e.g., the exact same 'Grocery bill added' entry is visible). A subtle cloud icon is positioned between the two phones, connecting them with subtle golden data streams and upward-pointing arrows, symbolizing live syncing. The overall design is clean, using deep navy, white, and a polished metallic gold accent.
assets.figma_notes: Auto-layout headline band; component variants for Android/iOS; logo as component; phone frame as component
assets.dev_notes: Export @1x PNG; no transparency on screenshots; sRGB; optimize with pngquant or Play Console upload

assets.title: Phone Screenshot 6 — Analytics
assets.purpose: Play Store screenshot #6 — highlight analytics feature for ASO conversion
assets.layout: Top text, large phone mockup dedicated to data visualization.
assets.colors: Primary Navy #003D66, Dark Navy #002847, Gold #C9A24E, White #FFFFFF, Muted #888888

assets.headline: Analytics
assets.supporting_text: Detailed spending charts and deep category breakdown.
assets.ai_prompt: A premium portrait phone screenshot (1080x1920) for the 'Trivense' app. Large, bold header: 'Analytics'. Smaller text: 'Detailed spending charts and deep category breakdown.' The phone mockup below is focused on a data visualization dashboard screen. It features a sophisticated, clean pie chart (using navy and white, with gold highlighting key segments) and a minimal bar graph. The screen clearly shows spending categories and trends. Surrounding the phone is a sophisticated flat illustration of abstract, interlocking charts, graphs, and financial data points, all colored in navy and gold. The overall feeling is professional, intelligent, and trustworthy.
assets.figma_notes: Auto-layout headline band; component variants for Android/iOS; logo as component; phone frame as component
assets.dev_notes: Export @1x PNG; no transparency on screenshots; sRGB; optimize with pngquant or Play Console upload

assets.title: Phone Screenshot 7 — Who Owes Whom
assets.purpose: Play Store screenshot #7 — highlight settlements feature for ASO conversion
assets.layout: Center-aligned text block, large single device showing a settlement list.
assets.colors: Primary Navy #003D66, Dark Navy #002847, Gold #C9A24E, White #FFFFFF, Muted #888888
assets.typography: Headline: Poppins Bold 50–54px; Subhead: Inter Medium 22px; Badge: Inter Medium 15px
assets.illustration: Two people shaking hands with simplified arrow and INR currency flow between them
assets.spacing: 48px edge padding; 64px headline-to-subhead; 19% headline band height
assets.ui_elements: Phone frame, settlements mock screen, badge pill, gold underline accent
assets.headline: Who Owes Whom
assets.supporting_text: Simplified debt resolution and effortless payments.
assets.ai_prompt: A premium portrait phone screenshot (1080x1920) for the 'Trivense' app. Large, bold header: 'Who Owes Whom'. Smaller text: 'Simplified debt resolution and effortless payments.' The phone mockup below shows a clean 'Settlements' screen. The screen displays a clear list of rounded cards with user names and profile icons, indicating who owes money. Example entries include 'Sarah owes you ₹850' with green text, and 'You owe Raj ₹1,200' with navy text. The surrounding background features a clean flat illustration of two stylized people reaching an agreement, with a sophisticated arrow and currency flow (showing the INR symbol) between them, rendered in navy and a soft gold. The lighting is bright and clean.
assets.figma_notes: Auto-layout headline band; component variants for Android/iOS; logo as component; phone frame as component
assets.dev_notes: Export @1x PNG; no transparency on screenshots; sRGB; optimize with pngquant or Play Console upload

screens.headline: Split Expenses Easily
screens.subhead: For groups, travelers, roommates, and more.
screens.layout_desc: Top text block, floating minimalist phone mockup below. Gradient background from light navy to white.
screens.illustration: Four diverse people collaborating over coins and a rising line graph
screens.ai_prompt: A premium portrait phone screenshot (1080x1920) for the 'Trivense' app. Large, bold header at the top: 'Split Expenses Easily'. Below it, smaller text: 'For groups, travelers, roommates, and more.' The main area features a clean, white background with a subtle soft blue-to-white gradient at the top. Floating in the center is a modern smartphone mockup showing the main Trivense Home Screen, which displays a balance card ('You are owed ₹1,200') and recent activity. Above and surrounding the phone mockup is a stylized flat illustration of four diverse people happily collaborating over a stack of modern coins and a rising gold line graph. The aesthetic is clean, minimal, and premium, using navy and gold accents. Rounded cards and soft shadows define the UI.
